stemHtml:
During flight planning, the pilot sees the route designator UM120-RNP on a chart. Per ICAO Annex 11, which elements are integral parts of this designator?

1. "U" denotes an upper air route
2. "M" denotes a regional area navigation route
3. "120" is part of the basic designator identifying the route
4. "RNP" indicates a prescribed navigation specification
